mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILES (POST_ID, FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, REG_DT) VALUES (#{postId}, #{fileNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID, POST_ID, FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, REG_DT FROM FILES WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
SELECT FILE_ID, POST_ID, FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, REG_DT FROM FILES WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
